title: The Plural of Anecdote Is Data: How Patients Describe Using Large Language Models for Health
description: An exploratory qualitative evidence map of public online anecdotes describing patient and caregiver use of large language models for health-related sensemaking, support, care navigation, behavior change, and safety failures. The repository includes the paper PDF, seed corpus, pilot-coded corpus, source appendix, codebook, and reproducible figure/PDF builder.
